name: InRetail Peru Corp.
summary: InRetail Per√É¬∫ Corp. operates as a multi-format retailer in Peru, Ecuador, Colombia, and Bolivia. The company operates through four segments: Supermarkets; Pharmacies; Manufacturing, Distribution and Marketing; and Shopping Malls. It operates its supermarkets under the Plaza Vea Hiper, Plaza Vea Super, Vivanda, Economax, and Mass brands; and pharmacy chains under the Inkafarma and Mifarma brands, as well as shopping centers chain under the Real Plaza brand. The company operates 506 supermarkets, 2,062 pharmacies, and 21 shopping malls. It also develops real estate properties. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Lima, Per√É¬∫. InRetail Per√É¬∫ Corp. is a subsidiary of Intercorp Retail Inc.
